subject: Re: WARP and live 2d classification
body:
Hi Genis,

There is nothing officially supported at the moment. If you have cryoSparc 
installed, you could build something around this library my colleague 
wrote: cdienem/SparcConnect: Libary of functions to connect to cryoSPARC2 
(github.com) <https://github.com/cdienem/SparcConnect>

In practice, performing C2D on the same sample makes sense for maybe the 
first couple of hours of collection. After that, you won't see significant 
changes unless you go all the way to 3D.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Sunday, March 28, 2021 at 1:43:32 PM UTC+2 genis.val...@gmail.com wrote:

> Hello WARP community!
>
> I was wondering if someone has a good solution to feed WARP particles into 
> any of the live 2d-classification tools.
>
> I think 2d-classification could be a nice addition to quickly assess the 
> quality of a dataset and help in grid screening.
>
> Best regards
>
> Genis
>
